what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links attachment att-efc7022d, of type board_items, to board item item-8e2826f3 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML front matter with no body content.
It references a target using a board://item-8e2826f3 URI.
It records an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format with a timezone offset.
standouts: The target is a board item URI (board://item-8e2826f3).
The attachment type board_items signals a board/artifact linkage rather than a code symbol.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter delimited by ---.
Uses a stable UUID-style id that matches the filename.
References external entities with a custom board:// URI scheme.
Includes an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset.
notes: A lightweight metadata stub that records when and how a board item attachment was added to the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What payload or content the board_items attachment carries beyond this metadata.
Whether board:// URIs resolve to items in the same repository or an external system.
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as a board_items attachment record matches the content: it identifies the attachment, channel, type, target, and addition time.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, discoverable record associating a channel attachment with a specific board item for later retrieval or audit.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a board item, which a fused system can use to navigate from channel context to board artifacts.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML metadata attachment record linking attachment att-efc7022d of type board_items to board item item-8e2826f3 in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record the attachment of a board item to a channel message or thread for traceability and cross-referencing.
